name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, mismatched supplier payment details cause late payments. We automate the extraction and validation of payment details instead of manual verification of payment details.
problem_solved: Mismatched supplier payment details leading to late payments.
features: manual entry for supplier payment details
